name: Alex Rivera
bio: Childhood best friend. Always down for a weekend LAN party or catching up over tacos.

name: Richardson
bio: Working together on the marketing team. We hit the local gym every Tuesday and Thursday.

name: Liam Nguyen
bio: Former university roommate. Planning a backpacking trip across Europe together next summer.

name: Martinez
bio: Grew up next door to each other. She moved to Chicago last year, so we need to set up a video call soon.

name: Marcus Brody
bio: Provides great career advice and constantly introduces me to excellent historical fiction novels.

name: Dubois
bio: Met at a local photography workshop. We frequently explore nature trails to capture landscape shots.

name: Daniel Kim
bio: Met during a college hackathon. We still collaborate on open-source side projects and tech ideas.

name: Patel
bio: Shared passion for indie music. We try to catch a local live show together at least once a month.
